ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Phil Foster, Esq., appearing for Judgment Creditor. Judgment Debtor Alex Warren appearing on his own behalf. Examination conducted. Proceedings reported by: Harriet Match Lage, CSR#1284.
Continued for further examination to 12/5/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 514. Counsel for Plaintiff to give notice. (514)

Mtn To Vacate Sister State Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: phil foster, esq., tour-sarkissian law offices, 415.626.7744, for plaintiff dr george kremer et al; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEX WARREN's Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment is denied without prejudice to refiling. Alex Warren is not a lawyer and therefore cannot represent Sinopia, LLC. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
